steps.title: Set the vertical value to zero
steps.content:
At the $x$-intercept, the $y$-coordinate is $0$. Substitute $y=0$ into the equation.
$$\frac{5}{8}x+\frac{2}{3}(0)=1$$

steps.title: Solve for the intercept
steps.content:
The equation becomes
$$\frac{5}{8}x=1$$
Multiply by the reciprocal.
$$x=\frac{8}{5}$$
The answer is 8/5.
